feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: You're a running car, I'm a closed garage.
entry.summary:
Author: dylaesthetics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,951Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 90

Summary: Dear Eddie,You probably have a lot of questions. I’ll get to answering them later. But first, let me paint you a picture.Imagine a little child, growing up in the depths of suburban Pennsylvania. They have no real friends, only their older sister. They have plenty of toys that were once said sister’s, including a collection of Barbies.Among these Barbies is a singular Ken. The child pays special attention to him. While their parents are wondering why the child isn’t obsessed with changing the Barbies into a thousand and one dresses, they take a pink marker and draw a birthmark on the side of Ken’s left eye. They keep Ken hidden from everyone else and only bring him out when no one’s around, to look at him long and hard, mesmerized.If you haven’t guessed yet, I am that child. ____OR Buck just wants to finally have an established partner in field at the 118. He doesn't expect the new hire to be the guy he'd dated back in college, before he dropped out and came out.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: There's No You Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: 79KJ01

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,961Chapters: 9/30Kudos: 25

Summary: “Where are you driving from?” Eddie asked, his mouth moving before he could stop it, his brain deciding that awkward small talk was infinitely safer than just standing there vibrating with nervous energy. “East,” the guy replied with a casual, fluid roll of his broad shoulders. “Farther than I wanted to be, honestly. And definitely longer than I originally planned.” Before the army, before Los Angeles, and long before the 118, there was a dusty gas station on the edge of El Paso, a broken-down Jeep with Pennsylvania plates, and a stranger named Evan. For years, they were each other's entire world, surviving basic training, AIT, and a grueling deployment side-by-side. But a devastating wave of silence and a massive misunderstanding tore them apart, leaving behind a deep, soul-cutting ache and a history neither of them ever truly moved on from. Now, the past has finally caught up to the present. Standing under the harsh fluorescent lights of Station 118, Eddie and Evan are forced to navigate the wreckage of the life they left behind—and the terrifying truth of everything they never stopped running from.

entry.title: One more taste of you
entry.summary:
Author: Tubagirl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,435Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 150

Summary: Evan Buckley can only watch as Eddie Diaz, his best friend and the man he secretly loves, is shot in the street by a sniper's bullet. But Buck can save Eddie, pulling him to safety under a firetruck and keeping him alive till he gets to hospital. While Eddie lies unconscious in his hospital bed, Buck steps up to look after Christopher, to keep the rest of his team safe. But Buck is struggling. Traumatised by the shooting, he finds it difficult to move forward. Buck was so close to Eddie when he was shot that he was covered in blood. On his face, on his clothes, in his hair. In his mouth. Now, everything he tries to eat or drink tastes of blood. Eddie's blood. How long can Buck keep going when he's struggling to eat and drink? How can he be the support Chris needs if he can't function? And how long can he go on pretending he doesn't have feelings for his best friend, when he can't imagine being able to cope without him.   OR Eddie gets shot and Buck struggles in the aftermath, his trauma stopping him eating or drinking till he's well past crisis point. And what will Eddie say when he returns to consciousness?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,401Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 13

entry.title: calling just to say goodnight
entry.summary:
Author: martianbarnes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,047Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: The house is dim and quiet when they get back, a stark contrast to Buck's place, with the patio door wider open, sunshine seeping through inside, toys spread around everywhere and Theo and Buck's loud chatter filling in the space to the brim. Eddie usually does not mind the quiet, but it feels like an absence of something he's been happily basking in all day. ORAfter spending a whole day together, Eddie still gets a call from Buck.

entry.title: What's Past Is Prologue
entry.summary:
Author: Duochanfan

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,334Chapters: 5/63Kudos: 157

Summary: Moving to LA with Shannon and Christopher was supposed to save his marriage. But Eddie Diaz is facing more than just recovery from his injuries in the sandbox. A chance meeting with former Navy SEAL Evan Buckley, and life takes a strong turn as the two rekindle a friendship that had begun in the sandbox, and their future starts to look just that little bit brighter.

entry.title: Where Equipment Failure Leads
entry.summary:
Author: SociallyAwkwardWeirdo25

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,712Chapters: 6/9Kudos: 39

Summary: Buck knew B Shift had been rough on the gear, it was mentioned during hand over, but he hadn't expected only one working harness for a cliffside rescue. Or anything that came after the harness snapped and he fell to the water below. But how was he to expect a Pod of man-hating Mermaids or that they couldn't just let him leave?   What was that about a Moon Pool?

entry.title: Surprise Baby (Babies?)
entry.summary:
Author: delusional911_buddie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 144,607Chapters: 48/51Kudos: 1,162

Summary: Buck and Eddie are a week away from getting married. But Buck hasn't been feeling good lately. So, he goes to a clinic. Turns out he’s pregnant with Eddie Diaz’s baby. Buck’s nervous to tell Eddie, but Eddie’s over the moon. Oh, and Eddie loves seeing his now husband pregnant with their baby. -------- The two men bond stronger with their family/the team. But especially with Bobby, Athena, and Chris. And each other.

entry.title: Aftershock
entry.summary:
Author: justherefortheplot

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,469Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 22

Summary: When Evan Buckley is struck by lightning during a rescue, the 118 prepare for the worst. Damon Salvatore refuses to let his friend die. Now Buck is waking up with heightened senses, impossible hunger, and the horrifying realization that death was only the beginning. As witches hide secrets, hunters sharpen stakes, and Los Angeles somehow becomes tangled in the Mystic Falls' supernatural world of chaos, Buck finds himself caught between the life he had and the monster he is becoming. And Damon may have just destroyed them both trying to save him.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 305,551Chapters: 63/?Kudos: 126

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: From Horror to Horror
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,134Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Maddie and Doug are spending the day at Hersheypark. At the end of the day, as they are leaving Hersheypark, Maddie gets kidnapped. Maddie doesn’t have much fight in her as she knows if she does get out of this she is just going back to her life with Doug. Eventually she manages to fight back and she makes it out of there alive. But trying to heal from her trauma from the kidnapping is hard enough on its own and it feels completely impossible when she is still with Doug and he blames her for getting kidnapped and gets mad at her for struggling to cope.

entry.title: Placeholders: They Come And They Go
entry.summary:
Author: BuckyBoils

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,208Chapters: 2/9Kudos: 37

Summary: “Buck?” he whimpers. Buck rubs his cheek on the delicate skin right where his jugular is, voice letting out a constant rumble. He’s purring, Eddie realizes. Buck’s purring. He puts his lips on Eddie's neck, smearing blood and goo all over him, sticky and wet. And there’s a sudden flick of a tongue, a feeling that makes Eddie’s knees buckle. “Are you scared?” Buck croaks out. It’s the first thing he’s said since he came here. “For you,” Eddie says. “I’m scared for you, bud. I just wanna know what’s wrong, you know, to-to protect you, to keep you safe.” “Safe?” “Yeah. I just wanna help you, Buck. You’re my best friend.” Buck nuzzles him. “Yours.” “Yeah,” Eddie says. “So, please.” And that’s when Buck bites. ———Or Buck changes overnight. A Jennifer's Body AU.
